coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 65% for 12:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. 108 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 10% complete. 9 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10% complete. 75% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 12 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 10% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75%, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 110 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 110 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 9:36. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
